item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min Connections of Touleen are not ruling out a tilt at the 1,000 Guineas despite her defeat
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 6min Connections of Touleen are not ruling out a tilt at the 1,000 Guineas despite her defeat on Saturday, but are open to the possibility that her best chance of Classic glory this year may come at beyond a mile
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 1 1 1 mil

item.title: paddypower: Paddy Power @paddypower · 18min Spurs messing up a deal to sign Morgan Gibbs-White in the summer, only for him to go and
item.description:
Paddy Power @paddypower · 18min Spurs messing up a deal to sign Morgan Gibbs-White in the summer, only for him to go and score a hat-trick to almost keep Forest up at their expense.
Incredibly Spursy. 7 23 215 11 mil

item.title: BetfairExchange: Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 24min Snubbed Tottenham in the summer, Morgan Gibbs-White has score
item.description:
Betfair reposteó Betfair Exchange @BetfairExchange · 24min Snubbed Tottenham in the summer, Morgan Gibbs-White has scored a hat-trick to send Spurs closer to relegation.
Spurs are now 1.91 for the drop (52% chance). 1 3 1 mil
